channel.title: Aaryan Gupta — Technical PM & HealthTech Insights
channel.description: Latest insights and articles on HealthTech digital transformation, clinic workflow management, Agile sprint delivery, and AI automation.

item.title: How to Build SaaS Without Monthly Fees | Aaryan Gupta
item.description: Learn how to architect, develop, and host micro-SaaS web products without recurring subscription fees using VPS, Docker, and self-hosted databases.

item.title: Jira vs. Notion for Startups | Aaryan Gupta
item.description: Deciding between Jira and Notion for your startup

item.title: Software Maintenance Guide for Non-Tech Founders | Aaryan Gupta
item.description: A comprehensive guide to website and software maintenance. Learn how to track patches, manage dependencies, audit speeds, and ensure uptime.

item.title: The TPM Role in Healthcare Integration | Aaryan Gupta
item.description: Understand the critical responsibilities of a Technical Project Manager coordinating HL7, FHIR, and EMR data integrations for medical clinics.

item.title: What is a Technical Project Manager? | Aaryan Gupta
item.description: Understand the role of a Technical Project Manager (TPM). Learn how coding literacy, API knowledge, and architectural awareness accelerate sprint deliveries.

item.title: Why Doctors Need Custom OPD Software | Aaryan Gupta
item.description: Discover why mainstream medical SaaS models fail Indian OPD consulting clinics and why custom self-hosted systems offer better workflows.
